items.title: New Girl Creator To Write Britney Spears Biopic
items.summary: We learned back in 2024 that Britney Spears had sold the rights to her memoir, The Woman In Me, to Universal, and a biopic was on the way with Marc Platt producing and Jon M. Chu directing. Now, we finally have an update. The post <em>New Girl</em> Creator To Write Britney Spears Biopic appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Blimp – “Awayward”
items.summary: Meet Blimp, a band that falls somewhere between grunge and emo. They've shared stages with bands like julie and Rocket, and their member Ren Takekawa also plays in yeule's band. The LA-based four-piece has been on the rise since their dark, enticing 2023 Egg EP.

items.title: Snooper – “Recess”
items.summary: Snooper have been making big moves. In April, vocalist Blair Tramel joined Hayley Williams onstage for a song. A couple weeks ago, the band was announced as openers for Mannequin Pussy and Wednesday's Bitch Cabal Tour, which rudely is not coming to New York.

items.title: Creative Alchemy and Reconciling Duality with Ghostie
items.summary: In the realm of the supernatural, the spirit world is not a monolith. In Japanese folklore, Yurei are the ghosts of the dead, tethered to this plane by unfinished business or unprocessed grief. Yokai are a collection of strange spirits, a sprawling class of supernatural beings that can be mischievous, monstrous, adorable or benevolent, occupying […]
